name: golang-github-rs-cors-dev
title: golang-github-rs-cors-dev
summary: net/http configurable handler to handle CORS requests
description:
net/http configurable handler to handle CORS requests
CORS is a net/http handler implementing Cross Origin Resource Sharing W3
specification (http://www.w3.org/TR/cors/) in Golang.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-rs-cors-dev because net/http configurable handler to handle CORS requests.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-rs-cors-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-rs-cors-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-rs-cors-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
